author: m1--full-system-adversarial-review
content:
Result: Full adversarial review ADR documented. 30 recommendations across 6 categories:

## Fixes Applied (2)
- F1 CRITICAL: Path traversal in knowledge slugs — fixed with safe_page_path() + 6 tests
- F2 HIGH: Unicode panic in truncate — fixed by delegating to crate::utils::truncate

## Security — Signing & Trust (7)
- S1 HIGH: SSH keys generated without passphrase (-N "")
- S2 HIGH: allowed_signers has no cryptographic integrity protection
- S3 HIGH: No key revocation or rotation mechanism
- S4 MEDIUM: verify_content() only checks exit code, doesn't parse output
- S5 MEDIUM: AllowedSigners parsing accepts any string as public key
- S6 MEDIUM: No audit logging of signature verification results
- S7 MEDIUM: Trust modifications don't record approver metadata

## Concurrency & Data Integrity (6)
- C1 HIGH: TOCTOU race in claim_lock() — two agents can claim same lock
- C2 HIGH: Display ID collision under concurrent creation
- C3 HIGH: Daemon silently swallows DB/sync init errors
- C4 HIGH: Daemon has no SIGTERM/SIGINT handler
- C5 MEDIUM: File writes not atomic (std::fs::write is not atomic)
- C6 MEDIUM: Stale lock detection vulnerable to clock skew

## Database (5)
- D1 HIGH: Silent error suppression in schema migrations (let _ = ...)
- D2 MEDIUM: No CHECK constraints on enum columns
- D3 MEDIUM: Transaction rollback errors silently suppressed
- D4 MEDIUM: parse_datetime silently falls back to Utc::now()
- D5 LOW: UUID column nullable with UNIQUE index

## Input Validation (4)
- V1 MEDIUM: No max length on string inputs (titles, descriptions, comments)
- V2 MEDIUM: No enum validation for status/priority/kind
- V3 MEDIUM: JSON import deserialization has no size limits
- V4 LOW: Agent ID allows single-character names

## CI/CD & Testing (5)
- T1 HIGH: Only 6 of 30+ code paths fuzzed
- T2 MEDIUM: Fuzz CI jobs use continue-on-error: true
- T3 MEDIUM: Fuzz durations only 30 seconds
- T4 MEDIUM: No explicit permissions block on CI jobs
- T5 MEDIUM: Cargo deps use broad version ranges

## VS Code Extension (3)
- E1 MEDIUM: Binary installed without checksum verification
- E2 MEDIUM: execSync used instead of execFileSync
- E3 LOW: Daemon output not sanitized for ANSI codes

## Triaged as Non-Issues (5)
- Export path (user already has fs access), symlink attacks (local-only dir), principal verification (ssh-keygen handles it), DB file permissions (standard for CLI), rate limiting (not exposed to untrusted callers)

Full details in ADR.md. Commit 5be0eca contains the two fixes.
